name: American Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ricotta, sugar, and vanilla together and set aside.
2. Combine the orange liquor and honey in a small bowl. Toss with the berries.
3. Slice the cake into triangles and place at the bottom of an 8-inch spring form pan. Sprinkle with rum.
4. Place ladyfingers around the sides of the pan, covering the base.
5. Spread half of the ricotta mixture over the cake layer on the bottom.
6. Sprinkle with some berries, orange juice, and vodka mixture, ricotta cream, and additional berries.
7. Add another layer of cake, drizzled with orange juice and vodka mixture, ricotta cream, and more berries.
8. Cover the entire trifle with whipped cream.
9. Decorate with the reserved berries.
10. Chill overnight before serving.
